entry.title: Re: Latest people profile - all actions button not available on future hires
entry.content: Hi Jessica, please refer to KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/0003611506

entry.title: Re: Croatia billing/posting date vs creation/issue date #...
entry.content: Is there no way to use a different posting date/tax reporting from the billing/issue date to avoid later needing to do an additional journal for the accrual? This causes additional work which could be solved by posting the revenue into the correct period at the point of creating the billing document

entry.title: Re: SNOTE tcode not accessible after implementing SAP Not...
entry.content:
Hello,

for your current sympton with snote check out 3432976 -> 3296107 -> manual prerequisites

furthermore to get snote 2502552  successfully implemented 

we needed to implement following snotes before:

2309538 (including manual todo after implementing)

3304656

after that we we are able to successfully implement snote 2502552

after that also necessary notes are 2399707 1668882 2758146 2745851

this should be also mentioned in conversion guide and its all dependent on your release and sps 

https://help.sap.com/doc/2b87656c4eee4284a5eb8976c0fe88fc/2021/en-US/CONV_OP2021.pdf

btw your mentioned snote 3093855 is not mentioned in conversionguide or as prerequisite in 2502552 

 

br

entry.title: 公有云版本生产订单误关闭，跨月后可以重新打开么
entry.content: 上月月结后，错误的关闭了一个生产订单（CO07创建，有投料与报工，未打TECO），本月期间发现后，可以CO02取消CLSD继续投料么？订单结算规则是维护到WBS上的

entry.title: CDS view for accessing customer group(sales area) in a customer master
entry.content:
I want to know the CDS view which can return me the customer group inside a BADI:_SD_SLS_CHECK_BEFORE_SAVE  based on customer as an input

Please advice

#CDS

entry.title: Re: How to get IDES like transactional data into S/4HANA cloud instance?
entry.content: Hi there, what kind of Ticket are you reffering to in order "to request the activation of the data"?

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Connector - websocket connection in SAP clo...
entry.content:
Well, I think that 400~500 ms is already *very fast* in a landscape like this... (The bandwidth can usually be increased, but the latency is more or less a hard physical limit determined by the distance between two points. I wouldn't be surprised if most of those 400~500 ms is due to the network latency between on-premises location and the Cloud data center.)

This is probably the best you can expect when communicating "across the internet"... The only way to make it faster would be: don't communicate across the internet. (I.e. don't use Cloud. Put both components, SAP DM and MQTT, into the same LAN segment. According to What Are Good Latency & Ping Speeds? | PingPlotter it is not unusual to have a latency of 100ms on an average internet connection, depending on distance and the number of routers that can forward a TCP packet to the next hop only after they have completely received it. In a good Gigabit-LAN, the latency is 1ms, so it could well be that 200ms of your 400-500ms roundtrip time are due to just latency?!)

entry.title: Depreciation Posted Monthly Despite Planned Useful Life of 1 Period
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

We are facing an issue with asset depreciation and would appreciate some guidance.

We have an asset that was created in March, with the capitalization date 31.03.2025. In transaction AS03, under Depreciation Area 01 (HB1), the following settings are maintained:

  • Depreciation Key: "Linear over remaining useful life, pro rata, down to zero"

  • Planned useful life in periods: 1

  • Depreciation calculation start date: 01.01.2025

Despite these settings, depreciation is being posted every month, which is not what we expect given the planned useful life of 1 period.

We initially tried changing the depreciation key to "100% depreciation" to see if this would resolve the issue — could this be a valid approach, or might it cause other inconsistencies?

Additionally, we are using transaction AFAR (Recalculate Depreciation):

  • How should AFAR be used correctly in this scenario?

  • Is it required after changing the depreciation key or useful life settings to ensure correct depreciation posting?

Any insights into the root cause or best practice for handling this would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Latest people profile - all actions button not available on future hires
entry.content: Thank you. However, this is not my case, it's not after going via the onboarding dashboard, and it's when I'm on the full profile. It's as a super admin when I search for the future user in the search bar. It works all fine when in legacy people profile, so I guess it has to do with the latest people profile.

entry.title: Re: Closing the order line has verified the material status.
entry.content: As I know, No. Closing an order item is treated as an item-level change. If the DChain-specific material status in Sales View 1 blocks order creation or changes, the check is triggered and the error is raised by design. The message cannot be removed; possibly, only material status customizing or a temporary status change can resolve it.

entry.title: Client requirement
entry.content:
Client wants planned order, production order daily planning reflect in capacity scheduling board in sap s4 hana public cloud.

I try all things regarding work center explore youtube, chatgpt nothing work plzz help me regarding this to resolve this issue. Also plzz give me solution for this issue because if i will not complete this client requirement they will fire me means company will fire me plzz help me.

entry.title: Re: SPL City field is blank
entry.content:
The City field cannot be conditionally ignored when empty. If included in the SPL profile, an empty City is processed as empty and cannot be bypassed. 
Stopwords and field-specific match percentages do not apply to City. Matching thresholds are profile-wide.
To avoid missed hits, may exclude City from the SPL profile.

entry.title: Re: Issue with SAP HANA Express Edition License on AWS Cloud
entry.content:
When the license expires, HANA switches to Invalid License, even if it was deployed via AWS Marketplace. You must either install a valid commercial HANA license or migrate to a supported HANA offering (e.g. full SAP HANA license or SAP HANA Cloud).
As I know, AWS Marketplace does not provide license renewal for HANA Express.

entry.title: Re: What transaction code can I use to export a list of e...
entry.content:
MM60 (Material List) or SE16N on table MARA / MVKE.
Filter by Material Status (e.g. Z1, Z2, Z3) and export the result.

entry.title: Re: Performance - PPH_HANA_ACTIVE Table
entry.content:
I would not use PPH_HANA_ACTIVE for custom logic.
It is SAP-internal and intended only for SAP programs/transactions, as stated in the notes.
Adding packages or Z-objects is not supported (as I know) and may negatively impact performance.

entry.title: Re: Replacing Allocation Structure in a Work Order
entry.content: As far as I know, this is not possible. The allocation structure is derived from the settlement profile and cannot be changed at work order level via BAPI or BAdI. To use a different allocation structure, a different settlement profile (and therefore a different order type) is required.

entry.title: Unable to access the VK11 'Create Condition Records for Pricing in Sales'
entry.content:
Unable to access the VK11 application in our SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud environment. Even though we have created the required roles/authorizations and assigned them to our user, the application is still not available and remains unsearchable in the search bar (Fiori Launchpad / App Finder).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to access the VK11 'Create Condition Records f...
entry.content:
App IDs VK11, VK12 and VK13 are not valid in Public Cloud environment as they are replaced by apps Set Material Prices - Sales, Set Service Prices - Sales and Set Tax Rates - Sales.

Refer this documentation: App Documentation 

  • You can manage material prices, service prices, and tax rates for sales by using the Set Material Prices – Sales app, Set Service Prices – Sales app, and Set Tax Rates – Sales app respectively.
  • You can manage both material and service prices in one place with the Manage Prices - Sales app. This app enables you to maintain multiple prices at one time and display condition records for different condition types in a list.

entry.title: Re: Issue with SAP HANA Express Edition License on AWS Cloud
entry.content: Thank you HakanHaslaman for your comment. Do you know which team or where we can get a valid commercial hana. Right now I delete the license and it recreated a temporary license on its own but that is just on a small RAM size. Do SAP still offer valid commercial license based on HardwareID

entry.title: Re: Error: Failed to get transports for selected package...
entry.content:
This usually means CTS can’t return any transport request for that package.
Use a transportable package (not $TMP), ensure the package has a Transport Layer assigned (SE80/Package), and that your user has CTS authorizations / open modifiable request in that system. Then deploy again.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2025 - Winners Announcement
entry.content: Congratulations to the winners !!!

entry.title: Re: Export Vendor returns
entry.content:
This looks to be by design.
Vendor returns use the plant -> shipping data sales area maintained in SPRO, not the BP’s sales area. Only one sales area can be assigned to the plant.

To resolve this, you must either extend Export vendors to the plant’s sales area (VNS1/10/00) or separate plants / shipping points for domestic vs. export scenarios.

entry.title: Re: SPL City field is blank
entry.content: Thanks very much for the reply. But i think stopwords apply to city . For example, BP address is 20 Chichunlu Road, City: Beijing. It should catch some SPL entities under ERL list. If i put Beijing as the stopword, it's no longer hitting the ERL list. You mentioned matching thresholds are profile-wide, what exactly does that mean?

entry.title: Re: HANA System Database copy scenario
entry.content:
The system database does not require XS roles for recovery. xs_worker / xs_standby are tenant-related roles and are not mandatory in the target system for system DB recovery.

Recovery fails only when the target system lacks mandatory system roles (worker/standby), not XS roles.

entry.title: Re: Inquiry about how to use the EXECUTE_UPDATE method of...
entry.content:
EXECUTE_UPDATE does not guarantee atomic processing for large parameter tables. For mass data, implicit DB limits (array size, packet size, resources) can cause partial execution without an ABAP error.
Split the data into smaller batches and commit explicitly. There is no fixed recommended size; it depends on the DB and system resources.
SAP recommendation: use package-based processing (e.g. 500–5,000 rows) and handle errors per batch.

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - Import /export user defined schemas in highe...
entry.content:
Hi @norman89till ,

Thanks for quick response. 

Do we have any kind of documentation or step by step guide anywhere. if yes, can you please help us with the same.

Regards,
Ankit Gupta

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning with Live Snowflake Data
entry.content:
Introduction

In Q4 2025, we released live versions for planning models in SAP Analytics Cloud: 

  • In seamless planning, you can connect live to fact data in SAP Datasphere (blogpost)
  • In non-seamless planning scenarios, you can connect to the live SQL sources available in SAP Analytics Cloud. Up until now, Google BigQuery was the only available source (blogpost)

With QRC1 2026, Snowflake is added to the portfolio of live sources and with that, you can now reference Snowflake data for planning without replication!

 

How does it work?

In my blogpost on live versions from Google BigQuery, I demonstrated how to add live data to an existing model. So this time, we will take another approach and create a planning model from data.

  • Go to the modeler
  • Create model
  • Create model from data
  • Choose Snowflake. You can filter the list of connections to Data Storage “Cloud”
  • Choose a connection.
  • Choose a view
  • The model is created along the source view’s structures. You see the instant live connection in the data preview

Model creation from live data

You can now work with this model as you know from model’s without live versions. In the example below, we remove dimensions and measures that we do not need. We re-create one of the measures as a live calculation.

Calculations on live data

We can also leverage the data in data actions. See this example where we copy the Actual data into a plan version with a factor. The actual version that you see is sourced directly from Snowflake. When we copy the data into a plan version, the plan data is stored in the fact table of our model in SAP Analytics Cloud. 

Planning

 

FAQ

Where can I use this feature?

This feature is available for SAP Analytics Cloud models that are not deployed to SAP Datasphere (=not using seamless planning).

Can I use any source view?

Yes. However, not all data types are supported (details).

What can I do with live versions? (And what can I not do?)

  • You can display the live version data in the model data foundation and in tables, charts, etc. in stories.
  • You can reference the live version data in model and story calculations as well as data actions (incl. advanced formulas).
  • You cannot write back to the source. You can copy the live version data into planning versions via copy/paste in the table, data actions and version management.

How do I see if data is live or not?

  • In models, a live version is highlighted in the data preview. In the version dimension, you see the data source per version. 
  • In tables, live version data is locked for data entry and formatted accordingly. Reasons for unplannable data give accurate information.

 

Conclusion

Live data access in planning models represents a massive opportunity. SAP Analytics Cloud aligns with SAP Business Data Cloud’s ambition to be open and keeps on expanding its live connectivity portfolio. Look forward to use your Azure data for planning in the future and follow the respective innovation in the Roadmap Explorer.

entry.title: Employee Local Currency View
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We have identified an issue with the "Employee Local Currency View" functionality in a Variable Pay template. Currently, the template has the currency views "Functional (EUR)" and "User" enabled.

The issue arises for users whose local currency is not EUR. When switching to the "Employee Local Currency View," the system does not display the local currency as expected. Instead, it continues to show amounts in EUR. However, it is converting the Bonus Target Amount from USD in EUR (Field “Target Incentive Amount” shows converted amount from USD to EUR as shown in the screenshot).

We checked the following:
• Currency Conversion Table looks fine
• Currency Code is displayed correctly in Employee History File
• In the Background Element the currencyCode has as Field Name VFLD14
• Currency Settings looks fine

Did anyone experience something similar in the past or has any ideas what could cause this issue?

Many thanks!

entry.title: End of Support indirect quotations BYOR (1S4)
entry.content:
As part of the information on release upgrade 2602, we have determined that the import of indirect quotations for the BYOR solution of scope item 1S4 will no longer be supported. 

In Europe and Germany, the European Central Bank (ECB) and the German Bundesbank are primarily available for retrieving exchange rates. Both institutions publish exchange rates for indirect quotation only.

Will the function for retrieving indirect quotations for the BYOR solution be completely disabled with release 2602?
If so, which institutions are recommended for retrieving direct quotations?

entry.title: Re: I can't find SSCUI 102258 in the Central Business Con...
entry.content:
Dear @seonjoong,

In Public Cloud the activity you’re looking for is not Define Discounting Rules (ID 102258) anymore

For Discounting of Long-Term Assets and Liabilities in Advanced Valuation, SAP current configuration IDs are:

  • Define Discounting Rules -> Configuration Activity ID 104799
  • Assign Discounting Rules to Accounting Principle -> Configuration Activity ID 104800

SAP Note below:

https://me.sap.com/notes/0003216580

SAP explicitly lists these IDs in the official Note for this process, along with the prerequisite Advanced Valuation config steps for example Activate Advanced Valuation ->ID 103315

So, 102258 is effectively outdated for this topic either an older mapping, documentation artifact or it now refers to something else and you should use 104799/104800 instead.

Still above doesn’t appear, probably the 3 most common causes:

1. Advanced Valuation not activated in configuration sequence
Make sure Activate Advanced Valuation (103315) was executed SAP lists this as step 1 prerequisite

2. Scope item mismatch
SAP references the process under Accounting and Financial Close (J58) in the official guidance. Ensure your activated scope covers this content

3. Missing configuration authorizations in CBC for example role

Best Regards,

Dawid

entry.title: Re: Integration of SAP Commerce with React JS – Guidance...
entry.content: I assume that you can start with checking spartacus code base. You need to implement occ client (special rest service for hybris). spartacus is component driven UI. So backend configuration (conent catalog) decide which components shown on UI. spartacus supporting smartedit (visual ui designer), it will pain point for you. you need to create your own smartedit for react. I think customers never pays your effort. They can't understand it is angular or react based. Also it isn't standart so you need to take care of it. hybris/spartacus releases new features and bugfixes. You can easy upgrade it.

entry.title: Re: SAP Discrete manufacturing: Manufacturing date is automatically determined

On the other hand, when I tried to create the batch from the confirmation, the system did ask me for the manufacturing date, the problem is that in this way the order is not associated with the batch.

entry.title: Re: While creating QN attachment in API I am getting the authorization error
entry.content:
Hi verorach_97.

Are you able add attachment to Quality Notification manually?

We got same issue as you with API : User has no authorization for operation 01 on object QMQMEL.

What i see, app Change Quality Notification does not allow attach file directly (as you can do in Sales Order v2 eg).

The only opportunity is link Documents from Manage Documents, nevertheless i was not able link SAT document. 

So, main question, can you achieve desired result manually?

I have strong feeling if it still not possible manually, we cannot do it via API (despite of we have 'proper' api and communication arrangement)

Regards

Vitali

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG standard Field mandatory for change/create re...
entry.content:
Hello @aziz_khan_ ,

As you mentioned in your comment, you can make the reason field mandatory by leveraging USMD_CREQUEST_INTEGRATION BAdI. When you are working with BAdI, you need to create a new BAdI Implementation. To create a BAdI Implementation, you can create it in that screen, or you can go to SE18 t-code.

Shortly, for BAdI implementation creation, you need to provide an Enhancement Implementation and a short text. Then, you need to enter a custom BAdI Implementation name and the Implementation Class. After your custom BAdI implementation is created, you can write your logic in the method IF_EX_USMD_CREQUEST_INTEGR~GET_CREQUEST_FLD_PROP.

entry.title: Compose Customer Explorations And Audience Activations , Audience activations.
entry.content:
Hello All, 

I am learning the SAP CRM platform from scratch and was working on the exercise packet provided when lunching the practice system. Currently doing Unite 9 solution 7.  From my very limited understanding of the exercise, the segment I am using for the exploration attribute is the one I created from the data source , C4H630 Exercises. 

When following the exercise packet some times the screenshots and the text instructions did not match. My Customer profile results did not match the exercise guide. Now my Customers Who Bought Computers In China have Zero Total Instances for  its Audience Activations. And I am not sure If the data source itself was edited or I did something wrong with the ingestions.

Note:  I reconnected the data sources twice because the first  ingestions would not work fully the first time. Also I am working on SAP Training Partner LSA for the Workplace.  

Help Please  

Thank you for reading

entry.title: Declarative Programming in CAP: Less Code, More Value
entry.content:
The Declarative Approach

Ever found yourself writing repetitive validation handlers or debugging complex imperative code? Declarative programming in SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) offers a better way. Declarative programming means describing what you want to achieve rather than how to achieve it. Instead of writing step-by-step instructions, you express the problem itself and let the system determine the solution automatically.

There are a couple of benefits using a declarative approach:

  • Improved Readability: Code that focuses on intent rather than implementing step-by-step instructions is clearer and easier to understand
  • Enhanced Maintainability: When rules live close to the data they govern, logic is easier to find and update
  • Reduced Boilerplate: Minimize repetitive code, streamline development, and reduce bug potential

In CAP, developers can declaratively define numerous CAP features - including queries and view definitions, input validations or annotation based constraints. The result? Less imperative code, consistent validations between backend and OData annotations, and logic that is intuitive to understand. This post walks you through the core concepts of declarative programming in CAP, covering declarative expressions, different kinds of input validations, how to use expressions as annotation values and the new @assert feature. These techniques work in both CAP Java and CAP Node.js.

 

Declarative Programming in CAP: Core Concepts

Declarative Expressions

With CAP, you can use declarative expressions in queries, view definitions, and calculated elements by defining them directly in your model. For example, you can use the exists predicate to select only those authors whose associated books contain elements with a price greater than 20:

Select from Authors { name } where exists books[price > 20.00]

In another example, you can use declarative expressions to compute free seats on a flight:

entity Flights : cuid {
  ...
  max_seats : Integer;
  occupied_seats : Integer;
  free_seats : Integer = max_seats - occupied_seats;
}

In all cases you can reduce the need for imperative code by using declarative expressions.

Please read our documentation for further information about views and projections and calculated elements.

Input Validations

Instead of writing custom event handlers for every validation, CAP provides several built-in annotations that handle common scenarios declaratively. These validations are executed at the database layer, reducing round trips and enabling efficient error aggregation:

  • @assert.format – validates that data matches regular expressions
  • @assert.range – validates that data is within a given range
  • @assert.target – validates that the target of an association exists
  • @mandatory – validates that a value is provided
  • @​readonly – ensures that a value is not modified
  • The .message suffix allows custom error messages instead of generic text

In the following example, you check that a description has a minimum length of 3 characters:

Description @assert.format: '.{3,}'  @assert.format.message: 'Description too short’

In CAP, Core Data Services (CDS) is used to define service definitions, data models, queries, and expressions. Using declarative annotations in CDS models reduces custom logic while keeping validations consistent across services and UI.

Learn more about event handlers in CAP Java and events in CAP Node.js  , read our documentation on declarative constraints and check out DJ Adams’ blog post Constraints, expressions and axioms in action.

Expressions as Annotation Values

Annotations can use CXL (CDS Expression Language) expressions as values. This is particularly useful for instance-based authorizations. The following code snippet ensures that users can only read, update, or delete orders they created:

annotate Orders with @(restrict: [
  { grant: ['READ', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE'], where: (createdBy = $user) }
]);

Using parentheses ensures that the CDS compiler can validate and optimize the expression.

You can also use dynamic expressions in UI annotations. The compiler translates these expressions automatically to the corresponding OData annotations:

 @​UI.Hidden: (status <> 'visible')

Learn more about expressions as annotation values.

If you are interested to learn more about CXL check out this mini-series on CXL by our Developer Advocate DJ Adams and Patrice Bender.

The New @assert Annotation

The @assert annotation is a new feature in CAP, released in December 2025. It enables complex, custom validations using CXL. This annotation provides a powerful way to enforce specific checks on inputs and raise appropriate errors if those checks fail. Error messages can be configured as either static strings or i18n message keys.

The annotation takes the form @assert: (<constraints>), where <constraints> are standard SQL case expressions containing one or more 'when' branches. The following example shows how to validate that a description is specified correctly:

annotate TravelService.Travels with {
  Description @assert: (case
    when Description is null then 'Description must be specified'
    when trim(Description) = '' then 'Description must not be empty'
    when length(Description) < 3 then 'Description too short'
  end);                                                              
}

It is also possible to formulate complex validations that would typically require a lot of code. The following example validates that the end date of a trip is not before the begin date and that all flight bookings fall within the travel period:

EndDate @assert: (case
 when EndDate < BeginDate then 'End Date must be after Begin Date'
 when exists Bookings [Flight.date > Travel.EndDate] then 'All bookings must be within the travel period'
end);

The new @assert feature enables you to leverage the full potential of the CXL expression language while ensuring that validations are executed efficiently directly on the database. It integrates tightly with the Fiori user interface, providing rich error feedback and reducing the need for custom code.  

 

Conclusion

Embracing declarative programming in CAP can transform the way you develop cloud applications. By reducing the need for custom code, ensuring consistency, and facilitating the expression of business logic, you can efficiently create applications that are easy to maintain and intuitive. Whether you're new to CAP or a seasoned developer, consider exploring the benefits of declarative programming. Start by reading our documentation.

Happy coding!

entry.title: TDR test environment scaling
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

I'm preparation for you TDR Test refresh environment.  We would like to get confirmation that the Test environment is scaled appropriately to handle our Production volume. 

Could you please confirm that this will not be an issue? 

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Connector - websocket connection in SAP clo...
entry.content:
To test your cloud latency you can go to azurespeed.com and select Europe West if you are in Europe.

Could you explain why in detail, why you are sending a message AND expecting a response . This is very unusual to do using an event broker .

Thanks

Kevin

entry.title: Re: TDR test environment scaling
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition – Test Data Refresh (TDR) there is no published hard limit (like X GB or X TB) on the volume of data transferred. The refresh is designed as a full copy of production master & transactional data to the target test system, and the actual transferable volume is governed more by system sizing, landscape, and service scheduling rather than a fixed numeric cap. Existing data in the target tenant is deleted and replaced during refresh.

Check the below articles: https://me.sap.com/notes/0003712509
https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/s4hana-cloud-test-data-refresh/faq

entry.title: Automatic removal of notifications when situation solved
entry.content:
Hi

I have a question regarding the automatic closing of a notification. From what I understand, you can get the system to automatically delete the notification when the situation is resolved.

My scenario is that I have created my own Situation type, where I check whether the purchase order has been updated with the relevant confirmations. However, I have not yet managed to get the system to remove the notification that was created in the first place, even though I have updated my purchase order.
This means that my selection is: if the confirmation control category is blank, I need to send a notification, and when the field is filled in, the notification should be removed.
But unfortunately, nothing happens, and I think it is because the selection criteria are no longer met.

Or?

entry.title: Issue with reservation while using IE4N for equipment installation/dismantling
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I'm looking to implement IE4N functions for serialized equipment installation/dismantling.

For first tests, everything is working well, but I realized that if a component is initially added to the maintenance order for the parts to be replaced, reservation remains open even when goods issue has been posted to the system through IE4N.

I tested in both ECC 6.0 and S/4 HANA 2020 and I do see the same behavior.

When I do the GI using reservation number in IE4N, it works and reservation is closing. But it is not a process that I want to use because it will be one more step for technicians/planners to get this information.

Is someone already experience that issue? It does not look that IE4N function is widely used so despite my searches, I've not been able to find any relevant information about that issue.

Thanks in advance!

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM)

entry.title: Re: Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Comprehensive Setup Guide
entry.content:
Hi @nageshcaparthy  ,

In the Joule setup for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, SAP Build Work Zone is mentioned as a mandatory component.

In our scenario, users access Joule directly from the SAP S/4HANA Fiori Launchpad and not from the Work Zone launchpad.

Could you please clarify why SAP Build Work Zone is still required in the overall architecture and what specific role it plays when Joule is triggered from the S/4HANA Fiori Launchpad?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: MDG :How to hide custom list UIBB based on company co...
entry.content: Could you please try this: io_ovp->get_uibbs( EXPORTING iv_content_area = 'BS_CU_MLT_ASSIGNMENT' IMPORTING et_uibb = DATA(lt_uibbs_cu) ).

entry.title: Re: MDG :How to hide custom list UIBB based on company co...
entry.content: @manoj_yadav60 , Could you please try this also: io_ovp->get_uibbs( EXPORTING iv_content_area = 'BS_CU_MLT_ASSIGNMENT' IMPORTING et_uibb = DATA(lt_uibbs_cu) ).

entry.title: RAP + Fiori elements: How do I show hierarchical data inside a Fiori Elements Object Page
entry.content:
Hello Everybody,

Actually I have created a RAP OData v4 in SAP S/HANA on-premise with a Fiori elements application. I am trying to display the data in my object page in hierarchical way. I have tried with define hierarchy view and the annotation @odata.hierarchy.recursiveHierarchy, but my system version does not support it. 
Does anyone have a solution to show hierarchical data inside a Fiori Elements Object Page?

Thank you,

entry.title: Dispute management : New Versus Solved Disputes – Today App is now working as expected
entry.content:
• New Versus Solved Disputes – Today App is now working as expected
  • New Versus Solved Disputes – Today App is showing wrong data for the Processor for Number of Disputes Current Month.

It is not showing correct data in the report

1. Dispute cases created in this month and assigned same processers for all the dispute cases

2. But in the app New Versus Solved Disputes – Today

When filtered ( By Dispute case( table current month )) it is showing correctly


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Dispute management : New Versus Solved Disputes – Tod...
entry.content:
We would like to provide clarity regarding the display criterion "By Processor (Number Current Month)" in the App New Versus Solved Disputes. The calculation for `Number of Disputes Current Month` is performed based on the key date of the current month using the formula:

Number of Disputes Current Month = Number of Dispute Cases Open in the current month - Number of Dispute Cases Closed in the current month.

Please note the following details for accuracy:
- The `Created At` date is considered for open dispute cases.
- The `Closed At` date is considered for closed dispute cases.

Reference : Help Portal

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud – Support for “Hierarchy with Directory” from SAP Datasphere via OData
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working with an SAP Datasphere Analytic Model that contains a Sold-To Party hierarchy defined as “Hierarchy with Directory.”
The hierarchy works correctly within SAP Datasphere.

To support report broadcasting, I exposed this Analytic Model via OData and imported it into SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). All measures and dimensions are imported correctly; however, the Hierarchy with Directory is not recognized properly in SAC (it appears flattened / directory attributes are ignored).

Based on SAP Help documentation, I see that:

  • Hierarchy with Directory has usage limitations outside Datasphere
  • OData consumption documentation does not mention support for hierarchy directory metadata
  • There is no explicit confirmation that SAC supports Hierarchy with Directory when consumed via OData from Datasphere

    My questions:

    1. Does SAP Analytics Cloud officially support Hierarchy with Directory from SAP Datasphere when consumed via OData?
    2. If not supported, is this a known limitation and is there any roadmap or planned enhancement?
    3. Are there any recommended best practices or workarounds (e.g., flattening hierarchies or rebuilding them in SAC)?

      Any official SAP confirmation, documentation reference, or roadmap insight would be greatly appreciated.

      Thank you in advance for your guidance.

      Best regards,
      Ganga Reddy Somu

entry.title: Re: Since Learning Rooms closed, where can we find live S...
entry.content:
Hi @namsheedks1 

There are several convenient ways to find Live Session details and registration links so you never miss an opportunity to learn, practice, and connect with SAP experts.

🔎 Explore the Live Sessions Catalog
Browse our catalog to discover upcoming Live Sessions tailored to your learning journey. It’s the fastest way to find and register for sessions that match your interests.


Method A — Using Search + Filters
  • Go to learning.sap.com
  • Type your topic in the search bar
  • Under Learning Type, select “Live Sessions”

→ This will show all upcoming live sessions for that topic.

Method B — Navigate manually

  • Log in to https://learning.sap.com/

  • Navigate to Browse → By Learning Type → Live Sessions
  • Or: My Learning → Live Sessions → Explore More

    Many learning journeys also have a section called Related Live Sessions.

📰 Subscribe to the  SAP Learning Newsletter in English 

Get the latest SAP Learning updates delivered straight to your inbox every month — including new content, live session announcements, and important platform news.

🎓 Visit the “Get Certified – Live Session Series” Blog

Looking for certification support?
This blog Get certified - Live session series - An additional offering to the self-paced study - Register now highlights certification‑oriented live sessions—an excellent complement to self‑paced study.

🗓️ Monthly Live Session Overview in this Group 
At the start of each month, I publish a curated blog post in this group listing all upcoming live sessions so you always have a clear overview of what’s planned.

🧭 If You Need Orientation: SAP Onboarding Webcasts
SAP also runs monthly onboarding sessions that explain how to use Learning Hub effectively, including where to find live sessions. Access this blog to learn more .SAP Learning Hub Adoption Sessions 2026


🗓️If you are looking for SAP SuccessFactors lives session the best way is to join the dedicated workspace.

Best Ways to Find Live Sessions Now
Need Best Place
Browse all SAP live sessionslearning.sap.com → Live Sessions
Certification‑oriented sessionsGet Certified Live Sessions Series
Topic‑specific webinars (BTP, AI, HR)SAP Community: Upcoming Live Sessions
If you have a Learning Hub subscriptionLearning Hub → My Learning → Live Sessions
Help getting startedLearning Hub Onboarding Webcasts

Please let me know if you need further details.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Unable to maintain reason for price change in Manage...
entry.content:
Dear @ijlsanthosh,

Option 1: Best if you need reporting

Use key user extensibility to add:

  • Reason for Price Change (Code list / dropdown)
  • Remarks (Text)

This is a standard and supported approach for Manage Prices Sales extensibility in Public Cloud

SAP Note beow:

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3043473

High-level steps:

  1. Open Custom Fields
  2. Create fields in the relevant pricing business context
  3. Enable Usage for the Manage Prices Sales UI and Publish
  4. In Manage Prices Sales, use Adapt UI if the field is not automatically placed on the screen
  5. If you use spreadsheet upload, your custom fields should appear in the template after publishing also

IMPORTANT: Values disappear after Save. SAP has a known issue pattern where a custom field shows on the UI but doesn’t persist if required configuration steps are missed SAP points to the Extensibility for Manage Prices Sales setup steps for that

SAP Note below:

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3535580

Option 2: Approval Workflows for Prices in Sales

If your need is primarily why was the price changed with approval traceability the workflow route is usually the cleanest governance pattern

Critical prerequisite: the condition table used must be created with release status, otherwise Request Approval stays greyed out. In Public Cloud you do this via 103119 Create Condition Tables for Pricing in Sales in CBC

SAP Note below:

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3517093

Summary:

  • If your business wants the reason visible and reportable with the price use option 1
  • If your business wants controlled changes + traceability use option 2

Best Regards,

Dawid

entry.title: NF-e rejected due to IBS rounding.
entry.content: We implemented the tax reform and identified in our invoicing that invoices with a value less than R$10.00 are being rejected. We noticed that the IBS field is zeroed due to the decimal places. Could you tell me if there is already a solution in SD (RVABRA) to handle the rounding of decimal places, or should the adjustment be made via BAPi?

entry.title: Re: The Importance of Primary Finance Settings in SAP Cloud ERP
entry.content:
Hi @Edna_Garcia1 , Thanks for your blog! It's very clear!

I have a question.

Now I understand that "the number and type of ledgers, Fiscal Year Variant (FYV), and Group Currency, once defined and saved in SAP Central Business Configuration (CBC), cannot be changed later."

As far as I'm aware, in CBC we can have both the Starter System (Evaluation Workspace) and the Development System (Implementation Workspace). Could I know in which workspace (Starter System or Development System) these configurations are defined and saved, making them unchangeable afterward?

Thank you.

BR,

Chloe

entry.title: Automatic removal of notifications when situation solved
entry.content:
Hi

I have a question regarding the automatic closing of a notification. From what I understand, you can get the system to automatically delete the notification when the situation is resolved.

My scenario is that I have created my own Situation type, where I check whether the purchase order has been updated with the relevant confirmations. However, I have not yet managed to get the system to remove the notification that was created in the first place, even though I have updated my purchase order.
This means that my selection is: if the confirmation control category is blank, I need to send a notification, and when the field is filled in, the notification should be removed.
But unfortunately, nothing happens, and I think it is because the selection criteria are no longer met.

Or?

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: Depreciation Posted Monthly Despite Planned Useful Li...
entry.content:
Hi ,

In our case, the asset was originally created with a useful life of 5 years. Later, we identified that the correct useful life should have been 3 years. To correct this, I updated the useful life in the asset master data accordingly.

After making the change, I executed AFAB for the depreciation run. As expected, the monthly depreciation amounts were adjusted, and the system recalculated the full depreciation based on the updated 3-year useful life.

For reference, AFAR is used when we need to recalculate depreciation values after changes to parameters such as useful life, depreciation key logic, shifts, etc. It ensures that base values and dependent calculations are fully updated.

Thanks

Nag

Thanks,

Phil

Is there a fix path SAP GUI und Planning grid checks before using whatever is set in JAVA_HOME and PATH?

entry.title: Re: Exposing SAP BW Extractors via ODP as an OData Service

entry.title: 🇧🇷 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Joinville, Brazil)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on Getting Started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core and Python. You do not need any background in the topic, but you should have a lot of curiosity!

In this CodeJam, you will learn how to use the Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core to implement retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). This approach improves the responses of large language models (LLMs) and reduces hallucinations. You will learn how to deploy an LLM and the orchestration service on SAP AI Core, and how to query it via SAP AI Launchpad and the Python SDK. Additionally, you will gain insights into key generative AI concepts and learn how to enhance RAG responses.

This is a free in-person event and is planned for Friday, March 13, 2026 in Joinville from 09:00 to 15:00. The language of the event is in Portuguese and the content is in English.

The event is part of the SIT Joinville that will take place the following day and it is sponsored by XYZ. Thank you!

The instructors is @jessicademarchi!

Location: Ágora Tech Park, Rua Dona Francisca, 8300 - Distrito Industrial, Joinville

Please note that spaces are limited; we can only accommodate 30 attendees. If you wish to attend, register by clicking the Yes button in the Will you be attending? section above to the right. A few weeks before the event, we will ask you to confirm your attendance.

Prerequisites: Any Chromium-based web browser, such as Microsoft Edge, Google Chrome etc.

Visit the SAP CodeJam group for more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees.

entry.title: Re: Settlement Management - Condition Contract - system e...
entry.content:
Hi @Dan_Str ,

Yes, I'm aware of this scenario. As mentioned in other SAP Community threads, even when using proformas, you'll still need to work with a dedicated Settlement Document Type - which are not related to condition contract / single document - that doesn’t post to accounting.

To handle both billing data and proformas, you'll need to build a custom CDS view or structure that merges data from:

  • Standard SD billing (e.g. VBRK/VBRP)

  • Proforma sources (e.g. WBRK/WBRP)

Regardless of the direction, integrating proformas will require a custom CDS view or logic to aggregate and align both data sources for use in reporting or settlement.

You could also create proforma on SD side instead of using Settlement document type, but the standard CDS view VWB2_VBRKVBRP_1 will not capture them either hence new CDS view inevitable. 

Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: block Purchase requisitions creation when there is a delivery block active on sales order
entry.content:

We are using a delivery block on Sales orders received via EDI where we activated the purchase requisition block. However, when the mrp is running it keeps creating purchase requisitions. 

Is there a possibility to block PR creation for normal sales orders until all checks are done? 

I found out OSS note 738171 but it seems it is concerning item category TAS en TAB, thus not sure if this is relevant here.

Kr,

entry.title: Re: SAP UI5 - Component-Based Architecture: Shell, Feature and Modules
entry.content:
Cool blog post, thanks for sharing! 🙂

I sometimes struggle with defining module-level boundaries. Specifically, which modules can depend on which APIs/Endpoints (if they're not solely passing along data in the frontend via models/routes/comp-level APIs). I'm curious about your approach: When designing multi-module applications do you see these modules as potentially reusable across applications, or are they intentionally application-specific and simply organized by feature but developed together in a e.g. a monorepo?

entry.title: Re: Business Partner Master- Collection Specific data adjustment
entry.content: I am facing the same issue, any update regarding this? How did you solved it ?

entry.title: How to automate NBP T-1 Exchange Rate logic in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am working on an S/4HANA Public Cloud project for a client in Poland. We have successfully automated the exchange rate feed from the National Bank of Poland (NBP) using the standard Datafeed (Refinitiv/MRM).

Polish VAT law requires using the exchange rate from the last working day preceding the service delivery (T-1 rule).

The automated feed correctly saves the rate with its true publication date (e.g., Jan 13 rate valid from Jan 13).

For an invoice created on Jan 14, the system should automatically pick up the Jan 13 rate.

The Issue: In standard SAP, the billing document looks for a rate matching the billing date. The customer currently uses a manual workaround by "shifting" the validity date of the Jan 13 rate to Jan 14 during manual upload so the system finds it. Since we are moving to automation, we can no longer "fake" the validity dates.

Question: What is the best practice in Public Cloud to handle this? I am considering using the BAdI SD_BIL_DATA_TRANSFER to set the Exchange Rate Date to Billing Date - 1.

- Is this the recommended approach for Poland local requirements?

- Are there any pitfalls with this BAdI approach regarding intercompany or credit memos?

- Is there a standard configuration setting I might be missing that handles this "look-back" logic natively?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: EWM Outbound delivery - how to update a custom status...
entry.content: Ah neat! So in the end, direct BO access can do the trick. Not _that_ much "cleaner" than her direct DB update imho. Especially since, as you mentioned, you'd wipe all statuses if not done carefully. It is what it is. Thanks for sharing! 🙂

entry.title: 2026 SAP BTP GTM strategy and priority initiatives for Partners
entry.content:
If you’re planning your 2026 GTM motions, this is one session you’ll want on your calendar.

SAP Business Technology Platform is no longer just “the platform behind the scenes”.  It’s becoming the engine of a consumption-led, AI-first go-to-market strategy — and Partners play a central role in making that real for customers.

In this executive-level webinar, SAP’s BTP Customer Success and Ecosystem leaders will walk through how SAP Build, SAP Integration Suite, CIAM, and Core AI fit together as one coherent story.  Not in theory, but in actual GTM scenarios Partners can use to drive pipeline, bookings, and long-term consumption.

We’ll look at how SAP BTP shows up across RISE with SAP and GROW with SAP, why cACV matters more than ever, and how partners can align clean core principles with real customer outcomes.  Plus, we’ll share concrete partner-led GTM plays, and enablement programs designed to help you scale.

If you’re focused on sharpening your SAP BTP value proposition and building repeatable GTM motions for 2026, this session is for you.

👉 Register now  https://partneredge.sap.com/en/library/education/psd/2026/feb/e_oe_te_w_PSD_WEB_00012968.html

#SAP #SAPPartners #SAPBTP #PartnerGTM #SAPBuild #EnterpriseAI

entry.title: Re: Configuring Employer Compliance Task for WTPA Forms
entry.content:
Ok, we were able to resolve this issue. Timezone was needed to be filled, and also Corporate Representatives were needed to be selected.

Lukas

entry.title: Український бізнес у режимі змін: інсайти від керівної директорки SAP Ukraine
entry.content:
Дві розмови з Ганною Мікулицькою, керівною директоркою SAP Ukraine, про те, як зараз працює бізнес в Україні і про роль технологій.

Процеси та гігієна даних

У розмові з KPMG Ганна розповіла, як цифрова трансформація стала ключовою умовою стійкості українського бізнесу в поточних (чи теперішніх) надскладних умовах:

  • Цифрова трансформація сьогодні — базова умова стійкості бізнесу. Війна прискорила перегляд ІТ-інфраструктури та впровадження сучасних цифрових рішень, що підвищують конкурентоспроможність на глобальному рівні.
  • Технологічний сектор — це не лише IT-компанії: сьогодні технології присутні майже в кожній організації — від банків і телекомів до державних установ.
  • Штучний інтелект та дані. Щоб AI працював ефективно, потрібні структуровані, якісні дані — це базова інвестиція перед автоматизацією.
  • Людський капітал змінюється: зростає роль жінок і перекваліфікація спеціалістів, зокрема ветеранів, а освітні ініціативи й програми розвитку цифрових навичок стають ключовими для майбутнього екосистеми.
  • Відмова від ворожого софту — це не лише безпека, а й ефективність. Перехід на сучасні цифрові продукти може значно підвищити ефективність економіки та створити нові можливості для бізнесу.

Оборонка, кібербезпека та ментальне здоров’я

У випуску Let’s Talk разом із Європейською Бізнес Асоціацією Ганна Мікулицька, керівна директорка SAP Ukraine, поділилася баченням того, як український бізнес адаптується до нової реальності та які зміни посилюють його конкурентоспроможність.

  • Темп змін в Україні випереджає європейські ринки.
    Трансформації відбуваються швидко, і в цьому контексті технології стають не розкішшю, а стратегічною необхідністю.
  • Люди — ключовий ресурс.
    Ганна обговорює, яким чином внутрішня стійкість, підтримка команд та увага до ментального здоров’я формують більш гнучку й ефективну організаційну культуру.
  • Україна — інноваційний хаб.
    У відео йдеться про те, чому Україна має всі шанси стати майданчиком для тестування нових технологій і привертати міжнародний інтерес.
  • Кібербезпека та ШІ — про практичний вплив.
    Це не абстрактні тренди: кібергігієна стає частиною бізнес-культури, а штучний інтелект — інструментом для реальних рішень.
  • Лідерство без дистанції.
    Ганна також торкається теми сучасного лідерства — як воно змінюється та що означає бути в контексті молодших поколін

Переходьте до перегляду повних інтерв'ю за посиланням:

KPMG Review magazine

EBA, Let’s Talk

А після перегляду чекаємо на вас у коментарях. Що вас зачепило найбільше? З чим ви погоджуєтесь, а з чим — ні?

entry.title: Re: Discovery Package: Test, Demo, and Development for SAP Cloud ERP Private
entry.content:
@kaijanssen 

Sorry for the late reply. Yes. Client copy is possible.

regards, Bettina

entry.title: Re: Discovery Package: Test, Demo, and Development for SAP Cloud ERP Private
entry.content:
@coffee_works 

Hi Annie,

You can extract your coding from the system using gCTS.

best regards, Bettina

entry.title: EBRR postings did not post
entry.content:
We had our FI periods closed for Jan 2026 but the CO period was open for the same. Time confirmation postings had happened in Jan (CO documents for allocations - Credit Cost Center & Debit- WBS) at that time and since the FI periods were closed the EBRR postings for the WIP & Unbilled Revenue did not post. Now if we open the FI period for Jan, will we be able to trigger this posting - if not is there an alternate method to automatically post the WIP & Unbilled Revenue entries?

Thanks

Sebastian James

entry.title: Re: Discovery Package: Test, Demo, and Development for SAP Cloud ERP Private
entry.content:
@Hiroya_Kita 

Hi Hiroya,

gCTS is the only supported tool. 

best regards, Bettina

entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Manufacturing - Data Archiving & Retentio...
entry.content:
Hello @Alexand3r,

I suggest you check this blog Data Archiving and Audit Log Management in SAP Digital Manufacturing, which includes latest information on the topics you asked. Hope it helps! Br, Manoel

entry.title: Re: Managing Invoices with SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management
entry.content:
Great Explanation @Abhijit_Shinde .

Question: Is it possible to post the supplier invoice against the asset in the CIM module. Asset tab is not activated in the fiori application 'manage supplier invoice centrally'?

 

Thanks

Naveen

entry.title: Re: About API Center of exercise environment
entry.content:
Hello!

All these portlets are managed by permissions; you can verify the permissions on this Help Portal - https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-platform/sap-successfactors-api-reference-guide-odata-v2/permissions-for-api-center?locale=en-US

 

Regards,

Giba

entry.title: Re: Supporting I-9 Documents - Delete/Reupload Documents
entry.content: Hello! Thank you for your response but I do not want to re-trigger the entire I-9 flow. I simply want to delete and reupload supporting documents. I believe this will re-trigger the entire I-9 flow, is that correct?

entry.title: Re: HANA System Database copy scenario
entry.content: Hello Hakan ,Many thanks for your reply . But if you look at Scenario 1 on same link for recovery from system 2 to system 1 its says "Recovery fails because the hosts in System 1 do not have the xs_worker and xs_standby roles." Can you help to clarify this please as you mentioned that "xs_worker / xs_standby are tenant-related roles and are not mandatory in the target system for system DB recovery."
